task_completion.description: Add the SwipeRefreshLayout dependency to the app-level build configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing 'app/build.gradle.kts' open in the editor with 'implementation("androidx.swiperefreshlayout:swiperefreshlayout:1.1.0")' added to the dependencies block.

task_completion.description: Update the main activity layout to include a SwipeRefreshLayout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing 'activity_main.xml' open in the editor with a '<androidx.swiperefreshlayout.widget.SwipeRefreshLayout>' tag added, wrapping the main content area (e.g., a RecyclerView).

task_completion.description: Assign the ID @+id/swipe_refresh to the SwipeRefreshLayout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the attribute 'android:id="@+id/swipe_refresh"' within the SwipeRefreshLayout XML tag in 'activity_main.xml'.

task_completion.description: Configure the refresh listener in MainActivity.kt to call viewModel.refreshData().
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing 'MainActivity.kt' open in the editor with code setting an 'setOnRefreshListener' on the swipe_refresh view, and explicitly calling 'viewModel.refreshData()' inside the listener.

task_completion.description: Manage the refresh indicator's visibility in MainActivity.kt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing code in 'MainActivity.kt' that updates the refreshing state of the SwipeRefreshLayout (e.g., setting 'isRefreshing = false') after the data refresh completes.
